failure_modes.cause: BPR set at 5.0 bar, but 51.9 bar required
Vapour pressure of solvent exceeds pump inlet pressure at T > 40°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Pressurise feed reservoir to 0.5 bar above vapour pressure

failure_modes.cause: High viscosity of deep eutectic solvent at operating temperature
failure_modes.mitigation: Ensure reactor tubing is rated for high pressure

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow
validation_experiments: Run blank solvent at Q=0.5 mL/min for 60 min; monitor pressure for drift > 5%
Test BPR with water at 51.9 bar to ensure it can maintain required pressure
Measure pressure drop across reactor with solvent at operating temperature to confirm system integrity
